text:
Created attachment 172551
Port source

The AmigaOS 3.9 header files are a part of the official AmigaOS NDK 3.9.
They are required when bulding and linking to the AmigaOS API.

WWW: http://os.amigaworld.de


portlint: OK
        do not forget to update ports/LEGAL

testport: OK
        poudriere: i386,  10.3 (tested)
        poudriere: amd64, 10.3 (tested)

        poudriere: i386,  9.3  (tested)
        poudriere: amd64, 9.3  (tested)
